metadata.title: Pricing | elReda Advertising
metadata.description: Explore elReda Advertising pricing tiers for creative services, digital growth, and custom technology projects.

hero.title: Transparent pricing for serious brand, digital, and systems work
hero.description: We price around outcomes, scope, and the level of coordination your business needs, not a generic menu of disconnected deliverables.

panel.title: A practical pricing model for work that has to perform.

clarity.label: Scope first
clarity.value: Deliverables, ownership, and timeline are agreed before cost.

fit.label: Right-sized engagement
fit.value: Choose a package, project quote, or ongoing retainer.

momentum.label: Business momentum
momentum.value: Investment is focused where it moves the company forward.

plans.title: Choose the level of partnership your next move needs
plans.description: These tiers frame typical starting points. Final scope is confirmed after discovery so the quote matches the work, not a template.

creative.title: Brand Launch
creative.summary: A focused creative package for companies that need a sharper identity and practical launch assets.
creative.bestFor: New ventures, refreshed brands, campaigns, and sales materials.
creative.nextStep: Confirm the visual scope, asset list, and delivery timeline.

features.first: Identity direction and core brand applications
features.fourth: Practical handoff for your internal team

growth.title: Digital Growth Build
growth.summary: A stronger digital presence for businesses that need website, campaign, and conversion work aligned.
growth.bestFor: Websites, e-commerce launches, acquisition campaigns, and digital operations.
growth.nextStep: Map the customer journey, content needs, and technical requirements.

systems.title: Systems & Automation
systems.summary: Custom technology work for teams that need operations, integrations, and reporting to work together.
systems.bestFor: ERP workflows, automation, dashboards, AI-assisted processes, and integrations.
systems.nextStep: Run discovery to define risk, dependencies, milestones, and ownership.

faq.title: Answers before the first pricing call
faq.description: A quick foundation for the questions teams usually ask before requesting a detailed proposal.

startingPrice.question: Do you publish exact prices?
startingPrice.answer: We publish pricing models, then confirm exact cost after scope. That keeps the proposal honest and avoids underquoting complex work.

customQuote.question: When does a project need a custom quote?
customQuote.answer: Custom quotes are used when the work includes integrations, multiple stakeholders, advanced content, or operational dependencies.

retainers.question: Can we work monthly?
retainers.answer: Yes. Retainers are available for ongoing creative, marketing, website, and systems support after priorities are defined.

changes.question: How are changes handled?
changes.answer: Each proposal defines review rounds, decision points, and what happens when scope changes after approval.

cta.title: Not sure what budget fits the work?
cta.subtitle: Start with a clear conversation. We will help you choose the right tier, quote structure, or retainer model.
